_comment: Optional manual overrides, keyed by 'HomeTeam-AwayTeam' (English, as football-data names them). Location + channels normally come from schedule.json (abola). Use this only to override: location (string), channels (extra list), youtube (url). Example: {"Portugal-Spain": {"youtube": "https://youtube.com/@livemodetv"}}. RTP/SIC/TVI free-TV games from publico.pt (2026-06-06); conditional 'caso Portugal' knockout games omitted (fixture unknown).
